name: Travis Scott
description: Cactus Jack, Astroworld, Houston-bred rapper and producer.

questions.q: What is Travis Scott's real name?

source.notes: Stage name combines uncle 'Travis' with rapper Kid Cudi (Scott Mescudi).

questions.q: In what year was Travis Scott born?
Which Texas city did Travis Scott grow up in?

source.notes: Spent early years with his grandmother in Missouri City, a Houston suburb.

questions.q: What is the name of Travis Scott's record label and merchandise brand?
Travis Scott's 2018 #1 album shares its name with what former Houston theme park?

source.notes: Six Flags AstroWorld closed in 2005. Album hit #1 on Billboard 200.

questions.q: Which 2016 hit features Kendrick Lamar and is on Travis Scott's 'Birds in the Trap'?
Which 2018 multi-section hit features Drake and is one of Travis's signature songs?
What was the title of Travis Scott's debut studio album (2015)?
choices: Birds in the Trap Sing McKnight

questions.q: What was the title of Travis Scott's 2023 studio album?
Which Kardashian-Jenner sister is the mother of Travis Scott's two children?

source.notes: Daughter Stormi (b. 2018), son Aire (b. 2022, briefly named Wolf).

questions.q: What is Travis Scott's daughter's name?
In 2020, Travis Scott held a record-breaking virtual concert in which video game?

source.notes: April 23, 2020 — over 12 million concurrent players for the 'Astronomical' event.

questions.q: What burger chain partnered with Travis Scott in 2020 for the famous 'Travis Scott Meal'?

source.notes: Quarter Pounder + bacon + lettuce + Sprite. Sold so well some locations ran out of ingredients.

questions.q: What sneaker brand has Travis Scott collaborated heavily with (backwards swoosh)?

source.notes: Air Jordan 1 'Cactus Jack' has reversed Swoosh.

questions.q: Which 2021 festival, founded by Travis Scott, ended in tragedy with 10 deaths in a crowd crush?

source.notes: November 5, 2021 in Houston. Deadliest concert disaster in U.S. history.

questions.q: What rap group did Travis Scott form with Quavo (one half of Migos)?

source.notes: Released album 'Huncho Jack, Jack Huncho' in 2017.

questions.q: Which Rihanna song features Travis Scott (from Anti, 2016)?
Which Travis Scott hit references the chaos-theory concept of small changes having big effects?
Which Houston-bred singer-rapper signed to Cactus Jack Records in 2018 and later released the album 'Heaven or Hell'?

source.notes: Don Toliver signed to Cactus Jack in August 2018; debut album 'Heaven or Hell' dropped 2020. Sheck Wes (also signed Feb 2018) is from Harlem. audit-corrected 2026-05-09: tightened stem to disambiguate Don Toliver from Sheck Wes (both signed in 2018).

questions.q: Which vocal effect is Travis Scott known for using heavily?
